Operation 'createContact' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too minimal. Enhanced version specifies what contact data is accepted, what is returned, and clarifies the side effect (contact becomes available for job assignment). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and when to use it.

data.current_description: Creates a new contact in the system.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new contact in SortScape. Accepts contact information such as name, email, phone, and address. Returns the created contact object with a unique ID. The contact is immediately available for job assignment and scheduling.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Enhanced version specifies what contact data is accepted, what is returned, and clarifies the side effect (contact becomes available for job assignment). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and when to use it.
